description: Invariant enforcement for the regression-tests plugin. Three hooks: UserPromptExpansion runs preflight (baseline + lint) before the skill starts; PreToolUse on Agent scans adversarial-specialist prompts for diff leakage; PostToolUse on Agent dispatches verify-new-tests-compile and run-new-tests based on subagent_type. Test-mutation enforcement is handled at end-of-phase by the orchestrator (audit) plus the adversarial-vacuousness/misalignment specialists, not per-author.
